@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+CREATE TABLE `device_code` (
+	`id` text PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
+	`device_code` text NOT NULL,
+	`user_code` text NOT NULL,
+	`user_id` text,
+	`expires_at` integer NOT NULL,
+	`status` text NOT NULL,
+	`last_polled_at` integer,
+	`polling_interval` integer,
+	`client_id` text,
+	`scope` text
+);
